description: Implement a data retention policy by purging inactive customers from the Chinook database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db. Inactive customers are defined as those who have not placed any orders in 2013 (InvoiceDate between '2013-01-01' and '2013-12-31'). Export a list of these inactive customers to /home/ga/Documents/exports/inactive_customers.csv including the columns CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Email, and TotalSpent (sum of the Total field from all their invoices). Permanently delete these inactive customers and their associated records in the invoices and invoice_items tables from the database. Save the SQL script used for the entire process to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/purge_process.sql.
